verses.latin_vulgate: Verbum quod factum est ad Jeremiam a Domino, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַדָּבָר֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָיָ֣ה אֶֽל־יִרְמְיָ֔הוּ מֵאֵ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The word that came to Jeremiah from the Lord, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on sana tapahtui Herralta Jeremialle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: The word that came to Jeremiah from the Lord, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sta in porta domus Domini, et prædica ibi verbum istud, et dic :   Audite verbum Domini, omnis Juda,  qui ingredimini per portas has ut adoretis Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲמֹ֗ד בְּשַׁ֙עַר֙ בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֔ה וְקָרָ֣אתָ שָּׁ֔ם אֶת־הַדָּבָ֖ר הַזֶּ֑ה וְאָמַרְתָּ֞ שִׁמְע֣וּ דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה כׇּל־יְהוּדָה֙ הַבָּאִים֙ בַּשְּׁעָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה לְהִֽשְׁתַּחֲוֺ֖ת לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Stand in the gate of the house of the Lord, and proclaim there this word, and say: Hear ye the word of the Lord, all ye men of Juda, that enter in at these gates, to adore the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seiso Herran huoneen portissa, saarnaa siellä tämä sana ja sano: kuulkaat Herran sanaa, kaikki Juuda, jotka käytte sisälle näistä porteista rukoilemaan Herraa.
verses.king_james: Stand in the gate of the Lord’s house, and proclaim there this word, and say, Hear the word of the Lord, all ye of Judah, that enter in at these gates to worship the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël :  Bonas facite vias vestras, et studia vestra,  et habitabo vobiscum in loco isto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּֽה־אָמַ֞ר יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הֵיטִ֥יבוּ דַרְכֵיכֶ֖ם וּמַעַלְלֵיכֶ֑ם וַאֲשַׁכְּנָ֣ה אֶתְכֶ֔ם בַּמָּק֖וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel: Make your ways and your doings good: and I will dwell with you in this place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala: parantakaat elämänne ja menonne, ja minä tahdon antaa teidän asua tässä paikassa.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, Amend your ways and your doings, and I will cause you to dwell in this place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite confidere in verbis mendacii, dicentes :  Templum Domini, templum Domini, templum Domini est !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּבְטְח֣וּ לָכֶ֔ם אֶל־דִּבְרֵ֥י הַשֶּׁ֖קֶר לֵאמֹ֑ר הֵיכַ֤ל יְהֹוָה֙ הֵיכַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֔ה הֵיכַ֥ל יְהֹוָ֖ה הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Trust not in lying words, saying: The temple of the Lord, the temple of the Lord, it is the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät luottako valheesen, sanoen: tässä on Herran templi, tässä on Herran templi, tässä on Herran temppeli.
verses.king_james: Trust ye not in lying words, saying, The temple of the Lord, The temple of the Lord, The temple of the Lord, are these.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam si bene direxeritis vias vestras, et studia vestra ;  si feceritis judicium inter virum et proximum ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אִם־הֵיטֵיב֙ תֵּיטִ֔יבוּ אֶת־דַּרְכֵיכֶ֖ם וְאֶת־מַעַלְלֵיכֶ֑ם אִם־עָשׂ֤וֹ תַֽעֲשׂוּ֙ מִשְׁפָּ֔ט בֵּ֥ין אִ֖ישׁ וּבֵ֥ין רֵעֵֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For if you will order well your ways, and your doings: if you will execute judgment between a man and his neighbour,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta parantakaat todella elämänne ja menonne, ja tehkäät jalo oikeus yhden ja toisen välillä.
verses.king_james: For if ye throughly amend your ways and your doings; if ye throughly execute judgment between a man and his neighbour;

verses.latin_vulgate: advenæ, et pupillo, et viduæ non feceritis calumniam,  nec sanguinem innocentem effuderitis in loco hoc,  et post deos alienos non ambulaveritis in malum vobismetipsis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גֵּ֣ר יָת֤וֹם וְאַלְמָנָה֙ לֹ֣א תַעֲשֹׁ֔קוּ וְדָ֣ם נָקִ֔י אַֽל־תִּשְׁפְּכ֖וּ בַּמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וְאַחֲרֵ֨י אֱלֹהִ֧ים אֲחֵרִ֛ים לֹ֥א תֵלְכ֖וּ לְרַ֥ע לָכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: If you oppress not the stranger, the fatherless, and the widow, and shed not innocent blood in this place, and walk not after strange gods to your own hurt,
verses.finnish_biblia: Muukalaisille, orvoille ja leskille älkäät tehkö väkivaltaa, älkäät myös vuodattako viatointa verta tässä paikassa, ja älkäät muita jumalia seuratko itsellenne vahingoksi;
verses.king_james: If ye oppress not the stranger, the fatherless, and the widow, and shed not innocent blood in this place, neither walk after other gods to your hurt:

verses.latin_vulgate: habitabo vobiscum in loco isto,  in terra quam dedi patribus vestris a sæculo et usque in sæculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁכַּנְתִּ֤י אֶתְכֶם֙ בַּמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה בָּאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לַאֲבוֹתֵיכֶ֑ם לְמִן־עוֹלָ֖ם וְעַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will dwell with you in this place: in the land, which I gave to your fathers from the beginning and for evermore.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä tahdon antaa teidän asua tässä paikassa aina ja ijankaikkisesti, tässä maassa, jonka minä annoin teidän isillenne.
verses.king_james: Then will I cause you to dwell in this place, in the land that I gave to your fathers, for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce vos confiditis vobis in sermonibus mendacii,  qui non proderunt vobis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה אַתֶּם֙ בֹּטְחִ֣ים לָכֶ֔ם עַל־דִּבְרֵ֖י הַשָּׁ֑קֶר לְבִלְתִּ֖י הוֹעִֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold you put your trust in lying words, which shall not profit you:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta te luotatte valheesen, joka ei mitään auta.
verses.king_james: Behold, ye trust in lying words, that cannot profit.

verses.latin_vulgate: furari, occidere, adulterari,  jurare mendaciter, libare Baalim,  et ire post deos alienos quos ignoratis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲגָנֹ֤ב ׀ רָצֹ֙חַ֙ וְֽנָאֹ֔ף וְהִשָּׁבֵ֥עַ לַשֶּׁ֖קֶר וְקַטֵּ֣ר לַבָּ֑עַל וְהָלֹ֗ךְ אַחֲרֵ֛י אֱלֹהִ֥ים אֲחֵרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־יְדַעְתֶּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: To steal, to murder, to commit adultery, to swear falsely, to offer to Baalim, and to go after strange gods, which you know not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja te olette vielä sittenkin varkaat, murhamiehet, huorintekiät, valapattoiset ja suitsutatte Baalille, ja noudatatte vieraita jumalia, joita ette tunne.
verses.king_james: Will ye steal, murder, and commit adultery, and swear falsely, and burn incense unto Baal, and walk after other gods whom ye know not;

verses.latin_vulgate: et venistis, et stetistis coram me  in domo hac, in qua invocatum est nomen meum,  et dixistis : Liberati sumus,  eo quod fecerimus omnes abominationes istas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָאתֶ֞ם וַעֲמַדְתֶּ֣ם לְפָנַ֗י בַּבַּ֤יִת הַזֶּה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נִקְרָֽא־שְׁמִ֣י עָלָ֔יו וַאֲמַרְתֶּ֖ם נִצַּ֑לְנוּ לְמַ֣עַן עֲשׂ֔וֹת אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַתּוֹעֵב֖וֹת הָאֵֽלֶּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you have come, and stood before me in this house, in which my name is called upon, and have said: We are delivered, because we have done all these abominations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te tulette myös ja seisotte minun edessäni tässä huoneessa, joka minun nimelläni kutsutaan, ja sanotte: ei meidän mitään hätää ole, vaikka me teemme nämät kauhistukset.
verses.king_james: And come and stand before me in this house, which is called by my name, and say, We are delivered to do all these abominations?

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid ergo spelunca latronum facta est domus ista,  in qua invocatum est nomen meum in oculis vestris ?  Ego, ego sum : ego vidi, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽמְעָרַ֣ת פָּרִצִ֗ים הָיָ֨ה הַבַּ֧יִת הַזֶּ֛ה אֲשֶׁר־נִקְרָֽא־שְׁמִ֥י עָלָ֖יו בְּעֵינֵיכֶ֑ם גַּ֧ם אָנֹכִ֛י הִנֵּ֥ה רָאִ֖יתִי נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Is this house then, in which my name hath been called upon, in your eyes become a den of robbers? I, I am he: I have seen it, saith the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pidättekö te siis tämän huoneen, joka minun nimelläni nimitetty on, ryövärien luolana? Katso, kyllä minä sen näen, sanoo Herra.
verses.king_james: Is this house, which is called by my name, become a den of robbers in your eyes? Behold, even I have seen it, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ite ad locum meum in Silo,  ubi habitavit nomen meum a principio,  et videte quæ fecerim ei propter malitiam populi mei Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לְכוּ־נָ֗א אֶל־מְקוֹמִי֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּשִׁיל֔וֹ אֲשֶׁ֨ר שִׁכַּ֧נְתִּֽי שְׁמִ֛י שָׁ֖ם בָּרִֽאשׁוֹנָ֑ה וּרְאוּ֙ אֵ֣ת אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂ֣יתִי ל֔וֹ מִפְּנֵ֕י רָעַ֖ת עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go ye to my place in Silo, where my name dwelt from the beginning: and see what I did to it for the wickedness of my people Israel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta menkäät nyt minun paikkaani, joka on Silossa, jossa minun nimeni ennen asunut on, ja katsokaat, mitä minä siellä tehnyt olen kansani Israelin pahuuden tähden.
verses.king_james: But go ye now unto my place which was in Shiloh, where I set my name at the first, and see what I did to it for the wickedness of my people Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc, quia fecistis omnia opera hæc, dicit Dominus,  et locutus sum ad vos mane consurgens, et loquens, et non audistis :  et vocavi vos, et non respondistis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה יַ֧עַן עֲשׂוֹתְכֶ֛ם אֶת־כׇּל־הַמַּעֲשִׂ֥ים הָאֵ֖לֶּה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וָאֲדַבֵּ֨ר אֲלֵיכֶ֜ם הַשְׁכֵּ֤ם וְדַבֵּר֙ וְלֹ֣א שְׁמַעְתֶּ֔ם וָאֶקְרָ֥א אֶתְכֶ֖ם וְלֹ֥א עֲנִיתֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now, because you have done all these works, saith the Lord: and I have spoken to you rising up early, and speaking, and you have not heard: and I have called you, and you have not answered:
verses.finnish_biblia: Että te nyt kaikkia näitä töitä teette, sanoo Herra, ja minä olen varhain noussut ja puhunut teille, ja ette tahdo kuulla, minä huudan, ja ette tahdo vastata;
verses.king_james: And now, because ye have done all these works, saith the Lord, and I spake unto you, rising up early and speaking, but ye heard not; and I called you, but ye answered not;

verses.latin_vulgate: faciam domui huic, in qua invocatum est nomen meum,  et in qua vos habetis fiduciam,  et loco quem dedi vobis et patribus vestris,  sicut feci Silo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעָשִׂ֜יתִי לַבַּ֣יִת ׀ אֲשֶׁ֧ר נִֽקְרָא־שְׁמִ֣י עָלָ֗יו אֲשֶׁ֤ר אַתֶּם֙ בֹּטְחִ֣ים בּ֔וֹ וְלַ֨מָּק֔וֹם אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥תִּי לָכֶ֖ם וְלַאֲבוֹתֵיכֶ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֖יתִי לְשִׁלֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will do to this house, in which my name is called upon, and in which you trust, and to the place which I have given you and your fathers, as I did to Silo.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä myös tahdon tehdä tämän huoneen kanssa, joka minun nimelläni nimitetty on, johon te luotatte, ja sen paikan kanssa, jonka minä teille ja teidän isillenne annoin, niinkuin minä tein Silon kanssa,
verses.king_james: Therefore will I do unto this house, which is called by my name, wherein ye trust, and unto the place which I gave to you and to your fathers, as I have done to Shiloh.

verses.latin_vulgate: et projiciam vos a facie mea  sicut projeci omnes fratres vestros,  universum semen Ephraim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁלַכְתִּ֥י אֶתְכֶ֖ם מֵעַ֣ל פָּנָ֑י כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר הִשְׁלַ֙כְתִּי֙ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲחֵיכֶ֔ם אֵ֖ת כׇּל־זֶ֥רַע אֶפְרָֽיִם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And I will cast you away from before my face, as I have cast away all your brethren, the whole seed of Ephraim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heitän teitä pois minun kasvoini edestä, niinkuin minä heitin pois kaikki teidän veljennekin, kaiken Ephraimin siemenen.
verses.king_james: And I will cast you out of my sight, as I have cast out all your brethren, even the whole seed of Ephraim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu ergo, noli orare pro populo hoc,  nec assumas pro eis laudem et orationem :  et non obsistas mihi,  quia non exaudiam te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה אַל־תִּתְפַּלֵּ֣ל ׀ בְּעַד־הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֗ה וְאַל־תִּשָּׂ֧א בַעֲדָ֛ם רִנָּ֥ה וּתְפִלָּ֖ה וְאַל־תִּפְגַּע־בִּ֑י כִּֽי־אֵינֶ֥נִּי שֹׁמֵ֖עַ אֹתָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore do not thou pray for this people, nor take to thee praise and supplication for them: and do not withstand me: for I will not hear thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ei sinun pidä rukoileman tämän kansan edestä, eikä myös yhtäkään valitusta eli rukousta tuoman edes, eli sinuas minun eteeni heidän tähtensä vaivaaman; sillä en minä tahdo sinua kuulla.
verses.king_james: Therefore pray not thou for this people, neither lift up cry nor prayer for them, neither make intercession to me: for I will not hear thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne vides quid isti faciunt in civitatibus Juda,  et in plateis Jerusalem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֵינְךָ֣ רֹאֶ֔ה מָ֛ה הֵ֥מָּה עֹשִׂ֖ים בְּעָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וּבְחֻצ֖וֹת יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Seest thou not what they do in the cities of Juda, and in the streets of Jerusalem?
verses.finnish_biblia: Etkös näe, mitä he tekevät Juudan kaupungeissa ja kujilla Jerusalemissa?
verses.king_james: Seest thou not what they do in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem?

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii colligunt ligna,  et patres succendunt ignem,  et mulieres conspergunt adipem,  ut faciant placentas reginæ cæli,  et libent diis alienis,  et me ad iracundiam provocent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבָּנִ֞ים מְלַקְּטִ֣ים עֵצִ֗ים וְהָאָבוֹת֙ מְבַעֲרִ֣ים אֶת־הָאֵ֔שׁ וְהַנָּשִׁ֖ים לָשׁ֣וֹת בָּצֵ֑ק לַעֲשׂ֨וֹת כַּוָּנִ֜ים לִמְלֶ֣כֶת הַשָּׁמַ֗יִם וְהַסֵּ֤ךְ נְסָכִים֙ לֵאלֹהִ֣ים אֲחֵרִ֔ים לְמַ֖עַן הַכְעִסֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The children gather wood, and the fathers kindle the fire, and the women knead the dough, to make cakes to the queen of heaven, and to offer libations to strange gods, and to provoke me to anger.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lapset kantavat puita, ja isät tekevät valkiaa, ja vaimot tekevät taikinaa uhrataksensa leipiä taivaan kuningattarelle, ja antaaksensa juomauhria vieraille jumalille, että he minua vihoittaisivat.
verses.king_james: The children gather wood, and the fathers kindle the fire, and the women knead their dough, to make cakes to the queen of heaven, and to pour out drink offerings unto other gods, that they may provoke me to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid me ad iracundiam provocant ?  dicit Dominus ;  nonne semetipsos in confusionem vultus sui ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֹתִ֛י הֵ֥ם מַכְעִסִ֖ים נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה הֲל֣וֹא אֹתָ֔ם לְמַ֖עַן בֹּ֥שֶׁת פְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Do they provoke me to anger, saith the Lord? is it not themselves, to the confusion of their own countenance?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei he minulle tee sillä mielikarvautta, sanoo Herra, vaan itsellensä, ja heidän pitää häpiään tuleman.
verses.king_james: Do they provoke me to anger? saith the Lord: do they not provoke themselves to the confusion of their own faces?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ideo hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce furor meus et indignatio mea conflatur super locum istum,  super viros, et super jumenta,  et super lignum regionis, et super fruges terræ :  et succendetur, et non extinguetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּה־אָמַ֣ר ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֗ה הִנֵּ֨ה אַפִּ֤י וַחֲמָתִי֙ נִתֶּ֙כֶת֙ אֶל־הַמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה עַל־הָאָדָם֙ וְעַל־הַבְּהֵמָ֔ה וְעַל־עֵ֥ץ הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה וְעַל־פְּרִ֣י הָאֲדָמָ֑ה וּבָעֲרָ֖ה וְלֹ֥א תִכְבֶּֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord God: Behold my wrath and my indignation is enkindled against this place, upon men and upon beasts, and upon the trees of the field, and upon the fruits of the land, and it shall burn, and shall not be quenched.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden näin sanoo Herra, Herra: katso, minun vihani ja minun julmuuteni on vuodatettu tähän paikkaan, sekä ihmisiin että karjaan, puihin metsässä ja maan hedelmään, joka pitää palaman, niin ettei yksikään sitä sammuttaa taida.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Behold, mine anger and my fury shall be poured out upon this place, upon man, and upon beast, and upon the trees of the field, and upon the fruit of the ground; and it shall burn, and shall not be quenched.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum, Deus Israël :  Holocautomata vestra addite victimis vestris,  et comedite carnes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֛ר יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל עֹלוֹתֵיכֶ֛ם סְפ֥וּ עַל־זִבְחֵיכֶ֖ם וְאִכְל֥וּ בָשָֽׂר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord of hosts the God of Israel: Add your burnt offerings to your sacrifices, and eat ye the flesh.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala: kootkaat teidän polttouhrinne ja muut uhrinne ja syökäät lihaa.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel; Put your burnt offerings unto your sacrifices, and eat flesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia non sum locutus cum patribus vestris, et non præcepi eis,  in die qua eduxi eos de terra Ægypti,  de verbo holocautomatum et victimarum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֠י לֹֽא־דִבַּ֤רְתִּי אֶת־אֲבֽוֹתֵיכֶם֙ וְלֹ֣א צִוִּיתִ֔ים בְּי֛וֹם (הוציא) [הוֹצִיאִ֥י] אוֹתָ֖ם מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם עַל־דִּבְרֵ֥י עוֹלָ֖ה וָזָֽבַח׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I spoke not to your fathers, and I commanded them not, in the day that I brought them out of the land of Egypt, concerning the matter of burnt offerings and sacrifices.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä päivänä, jona minä teidän isänne johdatin Egyptin maalta, en minä sanonut enkä käskyä antanut heille polttouhrista, enkä muusta uhrista;
verses.king_james: For I spake not unto your fathers, nor commanded them in the day that I brought them out of the land of Egypt, concerning burnt offerings or sacrifices:

verses.latin_vulgate: sed hoc verbum præcepi eis, dicens :  Audite vocem meam,  et ero vobis Deus,  et vos eritis mihi populus :  et ambulate in omni via quam mandavi vobis,  ut bene sit vobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אִֽם־אֶת־הַדָּבָ֣ר הַ֠זֶּ֠ה צִוִּ֨יתִי אוֹתָ֤ם לֵאמֹר֙ שִׁמְע֣וּ בְקוֹלִ֔י וְהָיִ֤יתִי לָכֶם֙ לֵֽאלֹהִ֔ים וְאַתֶּ֖ם תִּֽהְיוּ־לִ֣י לְעָ֑ם וַהֲלַכְתֶּ֗ם בְּכׇל־הַדֶּ֙רֶךְ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אֲצַוֶּ֣ה אֶתְכֶ֔ם לְמַ֖עַן יִיטַ֥ב לָכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But this thing I commanded them, saying: Hearken to my voice, and I will be your God, and you shall be my people: and walk ye in all the way that I have commanded you, that it may be well with you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan minä käskin heille ja sanoin: kuulkaat minun sanaani, niin minä tahdon olla teidän Jumalanne, ja te olette minun kansani; ja vaeltakaat kaikilla niillä teillä, joita minä käsken, että teille kävis hyvin.
verses.king_james: But this thing commanded I them, saying, Obey my voice, and I will be your God, and ye shall be my people: and walk ye in all the ways that I have commanded you, that it may be well unto you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non audierunt, nec inclinaverunt aurem suam :  sed abierunt in voluntatibus et in pravitate cordis sui mali :  factique sunt retrorsum, et non in ante,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֤א שָֽׁמְעוּ֙ וְלֹא־הִטּ֣וּ אֶת־אׇזְנָ֔ם וַיֵּֽלְכוּ֙ בְּמֹ֣עֵצ֔וֹת בִּשְׁרִר֖וּת לִבָּ֣ם הָרָ֑ע וַיִּהְי֥וּ לְאָח֖וֹר וְלֹ֥א לְפָנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But they hearkened not, nor inclined their ear: but walked in their own will, and in the perversity of their wicked heart: and went backward and not forward,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei he tahtoneet kuulla eikä korviansa kallistaa, vaan vaelsivat omassa neuvossansa ja pahan sydämensä halussa, ja kävivät takaperin ja ei edespäin.
verses.king_james: But they hearkened not, nor inclined their ear, but walked in the counsels and in the imagination of their evil heart, and went backward, and not forward.

verses.latin_vulgate: a die qua egressi sunt patres eorum de terra Ægypti  usque ad diem hanc.  Et misi ad vos omnes servos meos prophetas per diem,  consurgens diluculo, et mittens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמִן־הַיּ֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָצְא֤וּ אֲבֽוֹתֵיכֶם֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם עַ֖ד הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וָאֶשְׁלַ֤ח אֲלֵיכֶם֙ אֶת־כׇּל־עֲבָדַ֣י הַנְּבִיאִ֔ים י֖וֹם הַשְׁכֵּ֥ם וְשָׁלֹֽחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: From the day that their fathers came out of the land of Egypt, even to this day. And I have sent to you all my servants the prophets, from day to day, rising up early and sending.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siitä päivästä, kun teidän isänne läksivät Egyptin maalta, niin tähän päivään asti, olen minä lähettänyt joka päivä teille kaikki minun palveliani, prophetat, minä nousin varhain ja lähetin.
verses.king_james: Since the day that your fathers came forth out of the land of Egypt unto this day I have even sent unto you all my servants the prophets, daily rising up early and sending them:

verses.latin_vulgate: et non audierunt me,  nec inclinaverunt aurem suam :  sed induraverunt cervicem suam,  et pejus operati sunt quam patres eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְל֤וֹא שָֽׁמְעוּ֙ אֵלַ֔י וְלֹ֥א הִטּ֖וּ אֶת־אׇזְנָ֑ם וַיַּקְשׁוּ֙ אֶת־עׇרְפָּ֔ם הֵרֵ֖עוּ מֵאֲבוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they have not hearkened to me: nor inclined their ear: but have hardened their neck, and have done worse than their fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei he tahtoneet kuulla eikä korviansa kallistaa; vaan olivat niskurit, ja tekivät pahemmin kuin heidän isänsä.
verses.king_james: Yet they hearkened not unto me, nor inclined their ear, but hardened their neck: they did worse than their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et loqueris ad eos omnia verba hæc, et non audient te : et vocabis eos, et non respondebunt tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדִבַּרְתָּ֤ אֲלֵיהֶם֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה וְלֹ֥א יִשְׁמְע֖וּ אֵלֶ֑יךָ וְקָרָ֥אתָ אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם וְלֹ֥א יַעֲנֽוּכָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt speak to them all these words, but they will not hearken to thee: and thou shalt call them, but they will not answer thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jos sinä kaikki nämät sanot heille, niin ei he sittekään kuule sinua; ja jos sinä huudat, niin ei he sittekään sinua vastaa.
verses.king_james: Therefore thou shalt speak all these words unto them; but they will not hearken to thee: thou shalt also call unto them; but they will not answer thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dices ad eos :  Hæc est gens quæ non audivit vocem Domini Dei sui,  nec recepit disciplinam ;  periit fides,  et ablata est de ore eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֣ אֲלֵיהֶ֗ם זֶ֤ה הַגּוֹי֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לֽוֹא־שָׁמְע֗וּ בְּקוֹל֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהָ֔יו וְלֹ֥א לָקְח֖וּ מוּסָ֑ר אָֽבְדָה֙ הָאֱמוּנָ֔ה וְנִכְרְתָ֖ה מִפִּיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt say to them: This is a nation which hath not hearkened to the voice of the Lord their God, nor received instruction: faith is lost, and is taken away out of their mouth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sano heille: tämä on se kansa, joka ei Herran Jumalansa ääntä kuule, eikä tahdo kuritusta vastaan ottaa; totuus on peräti pois ja on temmattu heidän suustansa.
verses.king_james: But thou shalt say unto them, This is a nation that obeyeth not the voice of the Lord their God, nor receiveth correction: truth is perished, and is cut off from their mouth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tonde capillum tuum, et projice,  et sume in directum planctum :  quia projecit Dominus et reliquit generationem furoris sui ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גׇּזִּ֤י נִזְרֵךְ֙ וְֽהַשְׁלִ֔יכִי וּשְׂאִ֥י עַל־שְׁפָיִ֖ם קִינָ֑ה כִּ֚י מָאַ֣ס יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיִּטֹּ֖שׁ אֶת־דּ֥וֹר עֶבְרָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Cut off thy hair, and cast it away: and take up a lamentation on high: for the Lord hath rejected, and forsaken the generation of his wrath,
verses.finnish_biblia: Leikkaa hiukses ja heitä pois tyköäs, ja surkuttele sinuas valittain korkeuksissa; sillä Herra on hyljännyt ja ajanut tämän sukukunnan pois, jolta hän on vihoitettu.
verses.king_james: Cut off thine hair, O Jerusalem, and cast it away, and take up a lamentation on high places; for the Lord hath rejected and forsaken the generation of his wrath.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia fecerunt filii Juda malum in oculis meis, dicit Dominus.  Posuerunt offendicula sua in domo  in qua invocatum est nomen meum, ut polluerent eam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־עָשׂ֨וּ בְנֵי־יְהוּדָ֥ה הָרַ֛ע בְּעֵינַ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה שָׂ֣מוּ שִׁקּוּצֵיהֶ֗ם בַּבַּ֛יִת אֲשֶׁר־נִקְרָֽא־שְׁמִ֥י עָלָ֖יו לְטַמְּאֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because the children of Juda have done evil in my eyes, saith the Lord. They have set their abominations in the house in which my name is called upon, to pollute it;
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Juudan lapset tekevät pahaa minun silmäini edessä, sanoo Herra; he panevat siihen huoneesen kauhistuksen, joka minun nimelläni nimitetty on, saastuttaaksensa sitä.
verses.king_james: For the children of Judah have done evil in my sight, saith the Lord: they have set their abominations in the house which is called by my name, to pollute it.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ædificaverunt excelsa Topheth,  quæ est in valle filii Ennom,  ut incenderent filios suos et filias suas igni,  quæ non præcepi, nec cogitavi in corde meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבָנ֞וּ בָּמ֣וֹת הַתֹּ֗פֶת אֲשֶׁר֙ בְּגֵ֣יא בֶן־הִנֹּ֔ם לִשְׂרֹ֛ף אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶ֥ם וְאֶת־בְּנֹתֵיהֶ֖ם בָּאֵ֑שׁ אֲשֶׁר֙ לֹ֣א צִוִּ֔יתִי וְלֹ֥א עָלְתָ֖ה עַל־לִבִּֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they have built the high places of Topheth, which is in the valley of the son of Ennom, to burn their sons, and their daughters in the fire: which I commanded not, nor thought on in my heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he rakentavat Tophetin alttarin Hinnomin lasten laaksossa, polttaaksensa poikiansa ja tyttäriänsä tulessa; jota en minä käskenyt enkä ajatellut ole.
verses.king_james: And they have built the high places of Tophet, which is in the valley of the son of Hinnom, to burn their sons and their daughters in the fire; which I commanded them not, neither came it into my heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ideo ecce dies venient, dicit Dominus,  et non dicetur amplius Topheth, et vallis filii Ennom,  sed vallis interfectionis :  et sepelient in Topheth, eo quod non sit locus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן הִנֵּֽה־יָמִ֤ים בָּאִים֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְלֹא־יֵאָמֵ֨ר ע֤וֹד הַתֹּ֙פֶת֙ וְגֵ֣יא בֶן־הִנֹּ֔ם כִּ֖י אִם־גֵּ֣יא הַהֲרֵגָ֑ה וְקָבְר֥וּ בְתֹ֖פֶת מֵאֵ֥ין מָקֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore behold the days shall come, saith the Lord, and it shall no more be called Topheth, nor the valley of the son of Ennom: but the valley of slaughter: and they shall bury in Topheth, because there is no place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden katso, se aika tulee, sanoo Herra, ettei se pidä kutsuttaman Tophetiksi ja Hinnomin lasten laaksoksi, vaan Murhalaaksoksi; ja Tophetissa pitää haudattaman ruumiita, ettei enään ole siaa.
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the Lord, that it shall no more be called Tophet, nor the valley of the son of Hinnom, but the valley of slaughter: for they shall bury in Tophet, till there be no place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit morticinum populi hujus in cibos volucribus cæli et bestiis terræ,  et non erit qui abigat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽהָ֨יְתָ֜ה נִבְלַ֨ת הָעָ֤ם הַזֶּה֙ לְמַֽאֲכָ֔ל לְע֥וֹף הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וּלְבֶהֱמַ֣ת הָאָ֑רֶץ וְאֵ֖ין מַחֲרִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the carcasses of this people shall be meat for the fowls of the air, and for the beasts of the earth, and there shall be none to drive them away.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämän kansan ruumiit pitää taivaan lintuin ja maan eläinten ruaksi tuleman, ja ei yksikään pidä heitä siitä ajaman pois.
verses.king_james: And the carcases of this people shall be meat for the fowls of the heaven, and for the beasts of the earth; and none shall fray them away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et quiescere faciam de urbibus Juda,  et de plateis Jerusalem,  vocem gaudii et vocem lætitiæ,  vocem sponsi et vocem sponsæ :  in desolationem enim erit terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁבַּתִּ֣י ׀ מֵעָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֗ה וּמֵֽחֻצוֹת֙ יְר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם ק֤וֹל שָׂשׂוֹן֙ וְק֣וֹל שִׂמְחָ֔ה ק֥וֹל חָתָ֖ן וְק֣וֹל כַּלָּ֑ה כִּ֥י לְחׇרְבָּ֖ה תִּהְיֶ֥ה הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will cause to cease out of the cities of Juda, and out of the streets of Jerusalem, the voice of joy, and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom and the voice of the bride: for the land shall be desolate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä otan pois Juudan kaupungeista ja Jerusalemin kaduilta ilon ja riemun äänen, yljän ja morsiamen äänen; sillä maan pitää kylmille tuleman.
verses.king_james: Then will I cause to cease from the cities of Judah, and from the streets of Jerusalem, the voice of mirth, and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom, and the voice of the bride: for the land shall be desolate.
